_comment: Asset manifest for the 3D web renderer. Maps agents and object types/categories to real glTF (.glb) models. Absolute http(s) URLs load as-is; relative paths resolve under /static/assets/ (e.g. 'models/plant.glb'). The objects.by_category entries below are PRE-WIRED drop-in slots: add the matching .glb files to models/ and they render automatically. Until a file exists (or if it fails to load) the object falls back to its shipped SVG sprite. by_type overrides by_category for an exact type_id. See models/README.md for the recommended CC0 source models and the rename map.
